caption: Several men are seated in a tiered assembly hall with green carpeting and wooden desks. In the foreground, three men are seated; one wears a white shirt and glasses, while another wears a white shirt and dark glasses. Behind them, a man in a white shirt and a blue turban sits next to a man wearing a white shirt and a grey vest. In the background, other men are visible, including one wearing a blue vest. Throughout the sequence, the men remain seated in their respective positions, maintaining mostly static postures. The man in the white shirt and glasses in the foreground looks forward, while the man with dark glasses looks slightly to the side. The man in the blue turban and the man in the grey vest also look forward with neutral expressions. There is no visible on-screen text, logos, or significant movement between the frames.
